creator: crest@rlwinm.de
text:
The headers required build against libstlink are missing from the package. The headers in include directory of the stlink repo are not enough.

At least the following files from the stlink src directory are needed and should probably be installed into /usr/local/include/stlink:
  * sg.h
  * libusb_settings.h
  * logging.h
  * usb.h
